meaning: adj.用旧的,疲倦的 vbl.wear的过去分词
examples: She was looking very haggard and worn.
Worn rugs increase the danger of tripping.
Can we sit down? I'm worn out.
Williamsburg is famed (and scorned) for its hipster attire, worn by nearly everyone in the 'burg.
Somewhat worn old Mercedes cars seem to be the most popular vehicles among the biodiesel set.
